description.short: Microsoft Foundry internal FAQ, Azure Pricing, GTM strategy, content and more.
description.full:
HaeronClaw is a skills-first Microsoft expert agent that helps developers, architects, and business leaders work with Microsoft and Azure technologies.

Capabilities include:
- Real-time Azure pricing lookups and cost estimation across regions and SKUs via the Azure Retail Prices API
- Microsoft documentation search with source citations for architecture, configuration, and API questions
- FAQ and knowledge base powered by curated internal content on Azure programs, GitHub sales, Agent Factory, AI infrastructure, Azure OpenAI models, and Microsoft Foundry
- Document creation and manipulation: PowerPoint, Word, Excel, and PDF
- Strategic advisory: CTO-level architecture decisions, CEO-level executive strategy, product strategy with OKR cascades, and product management frameworks (RICE, PRDs)
- Marketing support: GTM strategy, competitive battlecards, demand generation, SEO optimization, and content creation
- Code sample discovery from official Microsoft and Azure SDK documentation

The agent always grounds answers in official documentation, fetches live pricing data before quoting costs, and cites sources. It routes requests through a catalog of 25+ specialized skills before falling back to general tool calls.
